title: Margaret River Tourist Park
description: Laid-back venue offering simple cabins with kitchens, plus BBQ facilities, a pool and a playground.
address: 44 Station Rd, Margaret River WA 6285, Australia
hotelDescription:
A 10-minute walk from the town centre, these unpretentious cottages are also 6 km from Margaret River Airport and 9 km from Surfers Point beach.
 All the studio to 2-bedroom cabins are simply furnished, and provide verandas, living and/or dining areas, and flat-screen TVs, as well as kitchens and air conditioning. DVD players are available, and there's private parking.
 Amenities include BBQ areas, a seasonal outdoor pool, and a kids' playground, plus coin-operated laundry facilities. There's also a caravan/camp site.

title: Riverview Tourist Park
address: 8/10 Willmott Ave, Margaret River WA 6285, Australia

title: Denny Creek Campground
description: Fire pits with built-in grills & electricity are offered at this scenic campground by a creek.

title: Margaret Lewis Norrie State Park
description: These 1,000 ac. include hiking trails, campgrounds, a public golf course & a river marina.

title: Capitol State Forest
description: Working forest & recreation area for camping, hiking, hunting, horse-riding & off-road vehicles.

title: Margaret McKenny Campground
address: 10900 Waddell Creek Rd SW, Olympia, WA 98512

title: Middle Waddell Campground
address: Waddell Creek Rd SW, Olympia, WA 98512

title: RAC Margaret River Nature Park
description: Rustic solar-powered resort offering low-key lodging, plus BBQs, fire pits & table tennis tables.
address: Wooditjup National Park, Carters Rd, Bramley WA 6285, Australia
hotelDescription:
Set in Bramley National Park, this rustic, solar-powered resort is 11 km from both Leeuwin Estate winery and restaurant, and the renowned surfing at Surfers Point.
 With shared bathrooms, the basic 5- to 24-bed dorms offer a communal kitchen. Wood-panelled 2-bedroom cabins and a 4-bedroom lodge add en-suite or private bathrooms, kitchenettes and fireplaces, plus decks and/or lounges. Hot water and power are limited.
 Amenities include an airy patio with table tennis, BBQs, and a seasonal fire pit. Mountain bikes are available for rent. Minimum-stay rules apply.
